trait.name: Null-Iron Weapons
entries: The Arcblade Guard's weapon attacks ignore resistance to nonmagical weapon damage. When the guard hits a creature concentrating on a spell, that creature makes the concentration save with disadvantage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Arcblade Guard makes two Arcblade attacks.

action.name: Arcblade
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) slashing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) force damage.

action.name: Suppressing Strike (Recharge 5-6)
entries: One creature hit by an Arcblade attack this turn must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be unable to cast spells until the end of its next turn.

reaction.name: Null Field Bash
entries: When a creature within 5 feet of the Arcblade Guard casts a spell, the guard makes one Arcblade attack against that creature.
